meaning: adj.心理测量的,心理测量学的
examples: I want to restore China's psychometric up.
We ask candidates to complete a psychometric questionnaire.
Possesses excellent Mandarin & Fair/Good English, math and psychometric abilities.
The candidates have undergone 90-minute interviews and have also had to face psychometric tests.
The study used 58, 000 volunteers who alongside their Facebook "likes" and demographic information also provided psychometric testing results - designed to highlight personality traits.
